title: INDUS X Educational Series: Gurukul Program
description: We're a fast-moving DoD organization contracting with commercial companies to solve national security problems
text:
Advance the future of defense capabilities and investment opportunities in the defense sector.
The Gurukul Educational Series is inspired from the ancient Indian Tradition of propagating education through learning via experience and discussions led by enlightened teachers and curious students. Through this series, we invite the visionaries of India and the U.S. for ‘semi-formal’ discussions with startups, students, innovators, and anyone willing and curious to learn more to develop deeper people-to-people ties. Speakers for this inaugural iteration include Jasjit Singh, the Executive Director of Select USA, Andrew Magliochetti, the Director at IronGate Capital Advisors. Speakers from iDEX are forthcoming.
This Gurukul will be moderated by Lauren Bedula, the Managing Director at Beacon Global Strategies.
Join us
What: INDUS X Educational Series: Gurukul Program
When: Feb. 9, 2024 at 7:45 a.m. - 9:15 a.m. EST
Where: ZoomGov Webinar
Who: All interested in investor expectations, ethical investments, and measures that can be taken to establish a sustainable commercial foundation for defense collaboration and production.
